title: TimeSeries BIDS converted
description: A BIDS-converted neuroimaging dataset containing time-series fNIRS data from 18 subjects across two sessions. The dataset includes near-infrared spectroscopy (NIRS) measurements with independent component analysis (ICA) denoising applied. Data were collected using continuous-wave NIRS with simultaneous measurement of oxygenated and deoxygenated hemoglobin concentrations. This dataset is derived from TimeSeriesHbORT_18sub_twoSessionICAdenoise and has been reformatted to comply with BIDS standards. NOTE: This dataset is currently under validation. Critical NIRS metadata fields (SamplingFrequency, NIRSChannelCount, source/detector mapping) and BIDS compliance must be confirmed before public release.
